zh.lifeSummary: 當Honor Tregarthin於1427年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，她的父親Sir William Tregarthen37歲，母親Margaret de Hendower27歲。她於1445年與John Trenoweth在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1465年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年38歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Honor Tregarthin于1427年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，她的父亲Sir William Tregarthen37岁，母亲Margaret de Hendower27岁。她于1445年与John Trenoweth在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1465年在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年38岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾聖 邁克爾 吉維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Honor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Honour ;  the dominant spelling of both the vocabulary word and the given name in the United States today. This is now the more frequent spelling of the name in Britain also, used, for example, for the actress  Honor Blackman  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Honour
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the quality (via Old French, from Latin honor). The name was popular with the Puritans in the 17th century and has remained in modest use to the present day.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Honor Tregarthin was born in 1427, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Tregarthen, was 37 and her mother, Margaret de Hendower, was 27. She married John Trenoweth in 1445, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1465, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Honor Tregarthin est née en 1427, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Tregarthen, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Hendower, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Trenoweth en 1445, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1465, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à St Michael Penkivel, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Honor Tregarthin 1427 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Tregarthen 37 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Hendower 27. Sie hat 1445 in Cornwall, England John Trenoweth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1465 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Honor Tregarthin è nata il nel 1427 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Tregarthen, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Hendower, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Trenoweth nel 1445, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1465, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Honor Tregarthinが1427年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir William Tregarthenは37歳，母Margaret de Hendowerは27歳であった。1445年にイギリスコルンワルでJohn Trenowethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1465年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで38歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルスト ミチャエル ペンキベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Honor Tregarthin(이)가 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Tregarthen(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Hendower(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 코른월에서 John Trenoweth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 스트 믹하얼 펜키벨에 묻혔다.

mn.Godolphin Manor, Helston, Cornwall distr: Hellys, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Honor Tregarthin nasceu em 1427, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Tregarthen, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Hendower, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Trenoweth em 1445, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1465, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Honor Tregarthin родилась в 1427 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Tregarthen было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Hendower, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Trenoweth в 1445 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1465 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мачаел пенкивел, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Honor Tregarthin nació en 1427, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Tregarthen, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaret de Hendower, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Trenoweth en 1445, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1465, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en St Michael Penkivel, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
